data.content:
Implementation complete on branch `codex/08c4-remove-execution-plan-fields` at commit `cf3bf7a74de8eeaf70aedf9d24d8829e9b356d97`.

What changed
- Removed persisted `repo_path` and top-level `knot_ids` from `ExecutionPlanData`.
- Kept execution-plan reads tolerant of legacy payloads while making step-local `knot_ids` the source of truth.
- Updated serialization, normalization, sync, CLI round-trip, and docs coverage to match the new shape.

Validation
- `cargo test execution_plan`
- `make sanity`
- pre-push coverage hook passed at 95.29%

Artifact
- Branch: `codex/08c4-remove-execution-plan-fields`
- Commit: `cf3bf7a74de8eeaf70aedf9d24d8829e9b356d97`
